groundingDensity: moderate and pressure-protective - the pass deepened Eastweald road texture, relay hardware, Stratholme food-route specificity, and object-contact detail while keeping the chapter's mobile briefing cadence clipped

scenes.title: The Road and the Room
scenes.summary: Bound the opening to Eastweald's working road through stubble, orchard ladders, meal wagons, hedges, and tack; translated the plague mechanism through granary, bakehouse, and kitchen nouns; sharpened the wound between Jandice's curated archive route and Sylvanas's stock-room path without explaining the subtext.

scenes.title: Lor'themar's Relay
scenes.summary: Kept the recall exchange on a live road through the amber relay crystal, damp farm smoke, thinning traffic, and passing civilians, so Convocation pressure stayed embodied instead of becoming floating politics.

scenes.title: Antonidas on the Stone
scenes.summary: Grounded the Dalaran call with mithril filigree, ditch water, hedge wind, horse misstep, and Violet Citadel memory; preserved the mechanism brief, the refusal to come home, and the omitted room without slipping into explanatory internal narration.

scenes.title: Hearthglen and the South Road
scenes.summary: Anchored the final third in mud, smoke, bow and horse geometry, Stratholme map surfaces, Market Row and service-gate infrastructure, then kept the ride-out concrete through bells, windows, horse lather, and hedged dusk.

constraintsObeyed.antiBloat: High-pressure beats stayed clipped. Added specificity came mostly through noun substitution, road texture, and contact beats rather than expansion blocks.
constraintsObeyed.antiSpoonfeeding: The sanctum wound stays in what Jaina says, omits, and physically avoids; the prose never translates the relationship damage for the reader.
constraintsObeyed.antiWiki: No lore paragraphs were inserted. Proper nouns arrive through active briefing, relay traffic, remembered route, or city triage logic.
constraintsObeyed.passiveReality: World detail enters through chalk, sacks, hedges, crystal, filigree, mud, map edges, ovens, and horse strain rather than narrator exposition.
constraintsObeyed.invisibleVerb: Standard verbs remained plain; grounding came from infrastructure, material surfaces, and institutional names.

auditResults.overGrounding: none detected - the pass stayed on route, relay, and food-distribution surfaces without swelling the chapter into lore prose
